name: Comprehensive Distinctive Feature System
description: Based on Blevins (2025), Hayes (2009), Chomsky & Halle (1968), and additional research. 27 features. h/ɦ/ʔ/ʍ follow Blevins analysis (-consonantal, +sonorant for h/ɦ/ʍ; +consonantal, -sonorant for ʔ follows SPE/Hayes). ɹ ɻ ʋ are [+consonantal] liquids, not glides. ɥ ɰ ɰ̠ are [-consonantal] glides. Trills and taps are [+continuant]. ɬ ɮ are [+strident]. Implosives: [+constrGl, +voice]. Ejectives: [+constrGl, -voice]. Clicks: [+click] combined with standard place and laryngeal features. ATR values given for glides/vowels; 0 for consonants (not specified).
